programme.title: Ben 10 S2
programme.desc: After discovering that Vilgax has joined forces with the Weatherheads, Ben must not only overcome his doubts, but must also fully embrace his new powers if he is to beat his foes.

programme.title: Ben 10 S2
programme.desc: When their attempt to get a photo with every storefront mascot is foiled, Ben and Gwen sneak out to get a snap with a wooden bear totem known as 'Yawk' only to find all the mascots have come to life.

programme.title: Ben 10 S2
programme.desc: When a cavity forces Ben to consult a dentist, his day gets worse when the mean magician Hex uses a dreamcatcher to bring Ben's fears to life and transports them both to a nightmarish dreamscape.

programme.title: Ben 10 S2
programme.desc: When the Rustbucket must have a tune-up in the same town as Zombozo's latest campaign trail stop, Ben discovers the clown is using his speeches to hypnotise and rob the town.

programme.title: Ben 10 S2
programme.desc: As the Tennysons dig up dinosaur fossils in the Badlands, Ben is unaware that Vilgax and Dr. Amino have teamed up to steal alien DNA from the Omnitrix. Vilgax then double-crosses his fellow villain.

programme.title: Ben 10 S2
programme.desc: During a live feed of the new transcontinental bullet train, La Grange enters the picture to outrace the train, but Ben joins in on the fun and will stop at nothing to come out on top!

programme.title: Ben 10 S2
programme.desc: After Max dozes off before a double feature, Ben and Gwen are left to save the drive-in on their own when evil magician Hex brings the film monster 'That' to life and unleashes it on the cinemagoers.

programme.title: Ben 10 S2
programme.desc: Ben and Gwen engage in a highly competitive paper airplane war, but when alien-tech drones bombard the Rustbucket, they must work together to foil the aerial attack and find out who's behind it.

programme.title: Ben 10 S2
programme.desc: Ben takes a detour on a jungle cruise during a trip to Adrenaworld West and finds himself hunted by the evil Tim Buktu. Ben must outwit Tim Buktu if he wants to make it off the theme park ride alive.

programme.title: Ben 10 S2
programme.desc: The Tennyson trio uncovers Steam Smythe's steam-powered generator during a sightseeing trip at the Geyser Gulch National Park, and must shut it down before it overloads the power grid.

programme.title: Ben 10 S2
programme.desc: When Gwen enters a pancake-eating contest at the world-famous Pancake Palace, Ben spots the Bugg Brothers and must stop them before they obtain an endless supply of what fuels their creations.

programme.title: Scoob!
programme.desc: Scooby and the gang face their biggest, most challenging mystery ever, a plot to unleash the ghost dog Cerberus upon the world.

programme.title: Tad, the Lost Explorer, and the Secret of King Midas
programme.desc: Tad travels to Las Vegas to see his friend Sara’s latest discovery – a papyrus who turns everything he touches into gold.

programme.title: Top Chef S17
programme.desc: It’s Restaurant Wars and this season Padma takes all the limitations off the table as the chefs can make as much food as they want and shop wherever they choose. The two winning chefs from last week’s concept challenge are given 48 hours to pick their teams and make the restaurants they pitched come to life.

programme.title: Top Chef S17
programme.desc: The chefs head to the mountains, a few hours outside of Los Angeles to go to Summer Camp where they are challenged to an outdoor grilling Quickfire for Padma and “Top Chef” Kentucky winner Kelsey Barnard Clark. Before the sun rises, the chefs get to work on an upscale brunch buffet for 200 moms vacationing at the camp using a very limited stock pantry. It’ll take more than s’mores and a round of kumbayas to impress the moms, the judges Tom, Padma and Gail, and guest judge “Top Chef” Charleston Winner Brooke Williamson.

programme.title: Top Chef S17
programme.desc: With only six chefs remaining, the challenges get even more difficult, when pastry super-chef Sherry Yard awaits the All Stars for a dreaded dessert Quickfire, made even more impossible when chefs must endure a blindfolded taste test to pick their ingredients. Then Michelin-starred Chefs/Restaurateurs Niki and Carole Lidi-Nakayama demonstrate a traditional Japanese Kaiseki meal, the ultimate in simplicity, restraint and precision. The chefs must make this formidable dinner for not just these Kaiseki masters, but in celebration of the Tokyo games with Olympic medalists Diana Taurasi, Rai Benjamin, Nastia Liukin, Ibtihaj Muhammad, Christian Coleman, Kerri Walsh Jennings and NBC Olympic Primetime Host Mike Tirico. The gold medal meal takes place at the iconic Los Angeles Coliseum with Padma, Tom, Nilou Motamed and Niki & Carole Lidi-Nakayama at the judges table.

programme.title: The National Dog Show ('20)
programme.desc: From the Kennel Club of Philadelphia, this cherished competition for all dog lovers returns for the 17th year. Hosted by John O'Hurley, the event features 2,000 of the nation's leading canines, including the world’s largest, smallest and most exotic. Over 170 breeds strut their stuff with the hope of becoming this year's top dog. “The Dean” David Frei provides expert show commentary, and Mary Carillo chimes in as an adept sideline reporter for this ultimate canine showdown. But which dog will have their day, and which will leave with their tail between their legs? After all, there can only be one “Best in Show”.

programme.title: Dog Man
programme.desc: Half dog, half man, Dog Man is sworn to protect and serve...as long as he isn’t distracted by squirrels.

programme.title: Austin Powers: The Spy Who Shagged Me
programme.desc: Dr. Evil returns from space just as British spy Austin Powers learns on his honeymoon that his wife, Vanessa is a fembot under Dr Evil's control.

programme.title: Taiwan Top 5
programme.desc: Peggy explores Taiwan's top five unique street foods. She tries to make some and learns what makes each of them so special.

programme.title: Around the World with Manu Feildel
programme.desc: Manu Feildel has a dream to follow in the footsteps of Jules Vernes’ Around the World in 80 days. So Manu sets himself a challenge to circumnavigate the world, through his food loving eyes. Will he make it? First stop - London.

programme.title: Around the World with Manu Feildel
programme.desc: Manu arrives in Dubai after London and is quick to dig up as much culinary experience in Dubai so he sets off to the spice souk, fish markets and a local pastry kitchen.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Japan
programme.desc: Adam Liaw discovers a host of delights in Japan. On the wintry northern island of Hokkaido, he samples sea urchin, pond smelt and boutique cheesecake.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Japan
programme.desc: Adam goes to sea with the fishermen who caught the so-called `million-dollar tuna'. He also meets a soy sauce maker who saved his staff from the 2011 tsunami.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Japan
programme.desc: Adam Liaw continues his culinary tour of Japan, preparing fresh sushi and taking a trip to his wife's hometown to indulge in a little home cooking.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Japan
programme.desc: Adam Liaw continues his culinary pilgrimage in Japan, devouring some of the finest miso, Nagoya chicken and Wagyu beef, and meeting a 74-year-old abalone diver.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Japan
programme.desc: In the vast urban sprawl of Tokyo, Adam Liaw explores a food culture that not only sustains the `salaryman' workers in style but retains culinary traditions.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Japan
programme.desc: Adam Liaw checks out the restaurants of food-crazy Tokyo and taste's some interesting dishes including Yakitori made from the reproductive organs of chickens.

programme.title: Around the World with Manu Feildel
programme.desc: Manu is in India for the first time in his life and wants to discover as much food as he can handle. From an Idli making lesson to a workout in the flower markets of Kolkata. Will he make it to Hong Kong on time and in one piece?

programme.title: Around the World with Manu Feildel
programme.desc: Manu heads to Hong Kong, the fourth country on his around the world tour, and he has some great food excursions lined up. Chicken feet, Tim Ho Wan, street food and lots to fit in before he jumps across the pond to Tokyo, Japan.

programme.title: Around the World with Manu Feildel
programme.desc: As Manu heads past his halfway mark on his journey around the world, he heads to Tokyo to explore the bustling city. It is a massive challenge and he is having the time of his life but how is that budget going?

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Japan
programme.desc: Adam Liaw discovers a host of delights in Japan. On the wintry northern island of Hokkaido, he samples sea urchin, pond smelt and boutique cheesecake.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Japan
programme.desc: Adam goes to sea with the fishermen who caught the so-called `million-dollar tuna'. He also meets a soy sauce maker who saved his staff from the 2011 tsunami.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Japan
programme.desc: Adam Liaw continues his culinary tour of Japan, preparing fresh sushi and taking a trip to his wife's hometown to indulge in a little home cooking.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Japan
programme.desc: Adam Liaw continues his culinary pilgrimage in Japan, devouring some of the finest miso, Nagoya chicken and Wagyu beef, and meeting a 74-year-old abalone diver.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Japan
programme.desc: In the vast urban sprawl of Tokyo, Adam Liaw explores a food culture that not only sustains the `salaryman' workers in style but retains culinary traditions.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Japan
programme.desc: Adam Liaw checks out the restaurants of food-crazy Tokyo and taste's some interesting dishes including Yakitori made from the reproductive organs of chickens.

programme.title: The Humboldt Current
programme.desc: In Chile's Torres del Paine melt from snow-covered mountains feeds finger-like fjords as they reach out to the sea to join the current lowering its salinity. Rivers estuaries and wetlands are home to many wading birds and the countless inlets and bays are magnets for rare dolphins and orcas.

programme.title: The Humboldt Current
programme.desc: The Humboldt Current is slower than most ocean currents but it’s the most dynamic in the world because it travels for such a long distance. Upwelling from the deepest trenches brings nutrients to the surface allowing phytoplankton to bloom laying the foundation for an intricate marine food chain

programme.title: The Humboldt Current
programme.desc: The current is followed by a unique population of Chilean blue whales and is the last refuge for other extremely rare marine mammals. From the chill of its deepest depths to the wind on its highest cliffs the current creates unusual habitats and is a study in survival.

programme.title: Attenborough's Life in Colour
programme.desc: Millions of years ago, the first animals had eyes that were unable to distinguish color -- yet as that changed, ‘seeing in color’ gave animals many advantages, whether to find food, attract a mate or warn off an enemy.

programme.title: Attenborough's Life in Colour
programme.desc: David Attenborough reveals some of the natural world’s most cunning tricksters and masters of disguise. Discover how some animals use color to hide and disappear into the background, or to trick and deceive.

programme.title: Attenborough's Life in Colour
programme.desc: Find out the stories behind the scientific research on animal colors - from robotic frogs wrestling with real-life counterparts, to spiders wearing eyeliner to attract mates.

programme.title: The Rhino Orphanage
programme.desc: It takes patience and commitment for The Rhino Orphanage, as they nurture young rhinos whose mothers have been lost to poaching.

programme.title: Wild Portugal
programme.desc: Rivers are lifelines in Wild Portugal, connecting mountains to the sea. Discover the Deer stag, frogs' spring rituals, and Grebes' dances, along with other animals and landscapes along these vital waterways.

programme.title: Wild Portugal
programme.desc: Portugal’s coastal waters and the Azores archipelago boast rich ecosystems. Explore the diverse species living in these waters and discover their unique lives in this revealing episode.

programme.title: Attenborough's Life in Colour
programme.desc: Millions of years ago, the first animals had eyes that were unable to distinguish color -- yet as that changed, ‘seeing in color’ gave animals many advantages, whether to find food, attract a mate or warn off an enemy.

programme.title: Wild Heroes
programme.desc: This time on Wild Heroes, Little penguin Snapper returns to the colony but will he be accepted? The vet team prepare to treat Samantran tiger Sali, and the Zoo helps to save an endangered native species at risk.

programme.title: Attenborough's Life in Colour
programme.desc: Find out the stories behind the scientific research on animal colors - from robotic frogs wrestling with real-life counterparts, to spiders wearing eyeliner to attract mates.

programme.title: The Rhino Orphanage
programme.desc: It takes patience and commitment for The Rhino Orphanage, as they nurture young rhinos whose mothers have been lost to poaching.

programme.title: Wild Heroes
programme.desc: This time on Wild Heroes, it's an anxious time for Zoo vets as they work to save one of the most endangered birds on the planet, and the ectotherm team are on a mission in the wild South Island.

programme.title: How Did They Fix That? S2
programme.desc: Mike Davidson joins the US Marines' 'Heavy Haulers' squadron as they're put to the test. They battle to keep their fleet of CH53 'Super Stallion' choppers flying, in preparation for intense warfare training exercises in the desert and mountains.

programme.title: How Did They Fix That? S2
programme.desc: Mike Davidson goes on a cross-country road trip to help the Well Done Foundation. They work to find and cap some of the estimated two million leaking, toxic - potentially deadly abandoned oil and gas wells that are scattered throughout the U.S.

programme.title: How Did They Fix That? S2
programme.desc: Mike Davidson embeds with the team of one of the most extreme, avalanche-prone mountain ski mountains in the world - Snowbird. They battle to keep the steep and deep slopes safe with shovels, snowcats and even a WWII Howitzer cannon.

programme.title: Go, Dog. Go!

programme.title: Dawn of the Croods
programme.desc: Gran is sick of the Croods not listening to her advice and fakes her own death. But, when the Croods don't mourn to her liking, she haunts them/Ahhh! Valley threatens to exile Sandy after a string of bad behavior unless the Croods can get her under control

programme.title: Dawn of the Croods
programme.desc: Eep gets struck with the crush curse when cute new guy, Kevin, comes to Ahhh! Valley. Her and Grug do everything they can to break the curse's hold/ Thunk starts to hang out with liyotes against Grug's wishes when he has a hard time fitting in with kids from school.

programme.title: Dawn of the Croods

programme.desc: Around 12,000 years ago, as the Ice Age finally thawed, humanity made a dramatic shift - abandoning nomadic life for permanent settlements.

programme.title: Hidden Frontiers: Arabia with Reza Pakravan 1
programme.desc: Reza ventures into an unexplored canyon in Saudi Arabia, searching for clues of lost civilizations.

programme.title: Alexander Armstrong in India 1
programme.desc: Alexander begins in Mumbai, riding the city's gleaming new metro before venturing into a forest with the world's highest concentration of leopards. From there, he heads to Bangalore, India's tech capital, where the future and tradition sit side by side.

programme.title: Joanna Lumley's Danube: Europe's Mightiest River 1
programme.desc: Joanna heads towards the Danube Delta, one of the last great wilderness areas remaining in Europe, full of birdlife including the majestic Pelican. At the mouth of the river, on Romania's Black Sea coast, Joanna bids farewell to the Danube and reflects on her amazing journey.

programme.title: Cyril Chauquet Wild Catch 1
programme.desc: Cyril faces snapping turtles, invasive jumping carp, and dangerous gators while hunting a 200-pound alligator gar in the perilous waters of Texas and Louisiana.

programme.title: Whale with Steve Backshall 1
programme.desc: Steve encounters the largest and most sophisticated hunters on the planet, revealing how the ingenious strategies used by whales can sometimes get these extraordinary predators in trouble.

programme.title: Iron Ball
programme.desc: This sports entertainment show brings the best special forces from Iron Squad to take on a new challenge – dodgeball. The 26 players will enter a fierce competition, until a strongest team armed with powerful athletic endurance and mental strength is formed. Witness how they compete in front of the star athletes and legendary dodgeball coaches!

programme.title: Detective Dee's Seven Deadly Sin
programme.desc: Detective Dee becomes embroiled in a series of murders that shake the Tang Empire. The killer invokes the "Seven Deadly Sins" to justify a twisted sense of justice. In his relentless pursuit of the truth, Detective Dee uncovers the mask of false righteousness and exposes the darkness hidden beneath.

programme.title: Extreme Ends
programme.desc: Extreme Ends is an action-adventure reality show featuring four celebrities and their special guests experiencing the diversity of Hong Kong! Join Filipino actor, model and swimmer Enchong Dee and his celebrity friend Ria, to explore the highs and lows of Hong Kong. They are eager to push their boundaries in this thrilling new adventure.

programme.title: Young IP Man: Crisis Time
programme.desc: Set in 1917, young Ip Man pursues his studies in Hong Kong. The school is held hostage on the day of an English speech competition, and as Ip Man decides to step up and fight the crisis, it is revealed that his master and his childhood friend are behind all this. Can he take them down and uphold justice?

programme.title: The Ultimate BROcation
programme.desc: A hilarious reality show about four famous male celebrities from different countries on an all-expenses-paid fantasy vacation in Hong Kong, tailor-made for the “bros”!

programme.title: RUTE:Toughness Redefined
programme.desc: The growing regional competition R U Tough Enough is searching for the toughest person from Southeast Asia. Join the search and meet some of the most mentally and physically strong individuals, leading up to an epic final showdown in Kuala Lumpur for the prize of US$15,000!

programme.title: The Fight Machine
programme.desc: Two young Canadians from starkly different worlds are each trapped in a life beyond his control. When they are pulled into the unforgiving underground bare knuckle fight circuit, their collision sparks a brutal journey of vengeance, retribution and self discovery.

programme.title: Iron Ball
programme.desc: This sports entertainment show brings the best special forces from Iron Squad to take on a new challenge – dodgeball. The 26 players will enter a fierce competition, until a strongest team armed with powerful athletic endurance and mental strength is formed. Witness how they compete in front of the star athletes and legendary dodgeball coaches!

programme.title: Detective Dee's Seven Deadly Sin
programme.desc: Detective Dee becomes embroiled in a series of murders that shake the Tang Empire. The killer invokes the "Seven Deadly Sins" to justify a twisted sense of justice. In his relentless pursuit of the truth, Detective Dee uncovers the mask of false righteousness and exposes the darkness hidden beneath.

programme.title: Munitions Hijacking Case
programme.desc: Agent Wen is assigned to work undercover for a Southeast Asian arms dealer to locate and destroy a cache of munitions. However, when he finally finds them, he is attacked by unknown gangsters and must team up with his partner to recover the weapons and prevent a disaster.

programme.title: Iron Squad W
programme.desc: The fourth season of this Korean military survival show will determine the most elite female soldier. It brings together six Special Force units to compete in challenging missions across land, sea, and air. Top female reservists form teams of four to compete against one another. Witness how they battle to the end in front of six celebrity hosts!

programme.title: Cruel War
programme.desc: To combat the greenhouse effect, scientist Yan Xin attempts to plant newly developed super rubber seeds on a remote island, hoping to transform it into a thriving new land. Yan Xin's ex-husband decides to accompany her on this perilous journey. As conflicts arise, they encounter the local drug cartel, and a fatal battle is about to begin.

programme.title: Extreme Ends
programme.desc: Extreme Ends is an action-adventure reality show featuring four celebrities and their special guests experiencing the diversity of Hong Kong! Join Indonesian famous models Patricia and Chika as they explore the city's hidden gems and vibrant scenes, immersing themselves in amazing contrasts and trendy vibes.

programme.title: Dragon Master: Dragon Spell
programme.desc: The Dragon King is locked in a seal by the Dragon Master for 500 years, and his daughter must travel back in time to 500 years ago to kill the Dragon Master, in order to reverse the act. Little did she know that the Dragon King and Dragon Master were close friends back then…

programme.title: Iron Ball
programme.desc: This sports entertainment show brings the best special forces from Iron Squad to take on a new challenge – dodgeball. The 26 players will enter a fierce competition, until a strongest team armed with powerful athletic endurance and mental strength is formed. Witness how they compete in front of the star athletes and legendary dodgeball coaches!

programme.title: Global Soul Kitchen (S1)
programme.desc: Chef Deborah VanTrece blends flavours from Latin and South America, adding her southern charm to create encocado shrimp with poblano-stuffed grits, also known as Latin shrimp and grits.

programme.title: Robin Roberts Presents I Will Survive: The Gloria Gaynor Story
programme.desc: The film chronicles Gaynor's rise to fame, from her humble beginnings to becoming one of the most iconic voices in music history. The biopic will also delve into the personal challenges Gaynor faced.

programme.title: As Luck Would Have It: Murder for Sale
programme.desc: Gabbi's longtime friend, Kimberly Stark, is selling her home. But the morning after the very first open house, her broker, Joe Parillo, is found dead in her foyer. Naturally, Kim turns to Gabbi for help.

programme.title: Rachael Ray in Tuscany
programme.desc: Pheasant is a popular type of poultry commonly used in Tuscany. Rachael demonstrates how to cook pheasant in a ragu sauce served over a bed of pappardelle pasta.

programme.title: Rachael Ray in Tuscany
programme.desc: Rachael cooks up her family's favourite version of spaghetti and meatballs with a Tuscan flair.

programme.title: Ppang Car Road 2
programme.desc: From Seoul to Busan, this spectacular eating show takes place at famous bakeries/patisseries to give the dessert lovers the glimpse of tasty goodness of some of the most-coveted desserts of all.

programme.title: All Fixed Up in an Empty Village (S3)
programme.desc: With the construction in full swing, the celebrity directors make a surprise visit to the site. But when they arrive, they find only the skeleton of Shin Dong's team's empty house.

programme.title: Zombie House Flipping (S5)
programme.desc: Derek's thrilled to flip a 60-year-old house, but Chauncey's doubtful. Massive repairs—foundation, termites, plumbing—threaten profit and project completion.

programme.title: Global Soul Kitchen (S1)
programme.desc: Chef Deborah VanTrece blends flavours from Latin and South America, adding her southern charm to create encocado shrimp with poblano-stuffed grits, also known as Latin shrimp and grits.

programme.title: The Mother Flip (S1)
programme.desc: Rebecca, Kristy and Roy have found their next potential flip: a lakefront property with a spicy past. Weather-beaten and dated, this former vacation home is definitely lacklustre.

programme.title: The Mother Flip (S1)
programme.desc: Kristy and Rebecca ride their bikes through the backroads of Burnett in the Hill Country to check out a two-storey abandoned house in the woods. It's an unfinished renovation that's seen better days.

programme.title: Oceanfront Property Hunt (S1)
programme.desc: Sean moved to the East Coast to be with Candace, but living in her bachelorette apartment is becoming cramped. They are searching for a seaside home that accommodates both of their needs.

programme.title: Theresa Caputo: Raising Spirits (S1)
programme.desc: Family is Theresa's cornerstone, which is why connecting people to their loved ones is her life's mission. In a reading she's never shared before, Theresa delivers healing messages to her son's friend.

programme.title: Vanished in Death Valley
programme.desc: A teenage girl goes missing when her family's car breaks down in Death Valley. Her parents will need to make unlikely allies if they are to find their daughter before she disappears forever.

programme.title: A Deadly Threat to my Family
programme.desc: When Ryan's sister, Serena, escapes from a dangerous cult, she seeks refuge with his family to rebuild her life. Ryan's wife, Marielle, is suspicious of Serena and doesn't believe she's truly reformed.

programme.title: A Chef's Deadly Revenge
programme.desc: Lucy has just escaped an abusive relationship when she meets the kind Frank, but when she discovers that Frank is stalking her, she decides she's had enough of abusive men and turns the tables on Frank.

programme.desc: Before heading out, the team gathers to decide who will be the dokbakja for the accommodation. But where's Dahee? In his absence, the group sets up a buffering rock-paper-scissors show in his honour.

programme.title: Ayesha's Home Kitchen (S1)
programme.desc: Ayesha Curry starts new family food traditions by making Peanut Butter and Jelly French Toast with her sister, Maria, and a Healthy Green Juice for her husband, Stephen.

programme.title: Chef Boot Camp (S2)
programme.desc: Chef Cliff Crooks sends struggling chefs from restaurants across America on a gruelling boot camp to prove they deserve to keep running their kitchens.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0 (S3)
programme.desc: Alfonso explores treats with serious pop, like Big League Chew bubblegum.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0 (S3)
programme.desc: Alfonso Ribeiro explores little treats with big flavor.

programme.title: From the Source (S2)
programme.desc: Award-winning chef and restaurateur Katie Button explores the stories and uses behind different delicious ingredients and shares her knowledge of cooking techniques.

programme.desc: Katie explores the origins of corn as an important and often secret ingredient in many foods.

programme.desc: Food Network stars go all out for these sweet and salty indulgences.

programme.title: The Mega-Brands that Built the World (S3)
programme.desc: The biggest names in computers go head-to-head in a race to create the first portable computers. Through massive failures and shocking alliances, they'll usher in their first-ever handheld device.

programme.title: History's Greatest Mysteries (S5)
programme.desc: The search for the most famous gold mine in the Old West has led many to perish in the pursuit of its elusive riches. Legend suggests the gold and the land it's hidden on are somehow cursed.

programme.title: Dark Marvels
programme.desc: Whether they're used to stop treasure hunters, body snatchers, or wartime enemies, booby traps are diabolical devices just waiting to kill.

programme.title: Alone (S12)
programme.desc: The remaining three survivalists continue to push their limits as they reach nearly a month in the Great Karoo Desert. One participant loses the use of a major tool and all their hope along with it.

programme.title: Pawn Stars (S24)
programme.desc: Rick tries not to slip up when making a deal on a pair of snowshoes used in World War II. Then, Rick and Corey get a blast from the past when they go see a hand cannon from the 1600s.

programme.title: The Mega-Brands that Built the World (S3)
programme.desc: The biggest names in computers go head-to-head in a race to create the first portable computers. Through massive failures and shocking alliances, they'll usher in their first-ever handheld device.

programme.title: Dark Marvels
programme.desc: Whether they're used to stop treasure hunters, body snatchers, or wartime enemies, booby traps are diabolical devices just waiting to kill.

programme.title: The Secret of Skinwalker Ranch (S5)
programme.desc: The legend that warns against digging on Skinwalker Ranch becomes all too real as the team breaks ground near the Triangle.

programme.title: Hazardous History with Henry Winkler (S1)
programme.desc: You thought your job was tough? Uncover the dangerous gigs of the past – from mercury-poisoned hat makers to kids crawling through chimneys – and imagine the risks behind everyday jobs of old.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens (S16)
programme.desc: The ancient Sumerians established the world's first civilisation, and they credited their achievements to their gods, the Anunnaki. But is it possible these powerful beings were extraterrestrial visitors?

programme.title: The Bermuda Triangle: Into Cursed Waters (S2)
programme.desc: Are modern-day pirates prowling the Bermuda Triangle in search of victims? The team takes on the twisted case of a missing boat called the Saba Bank lost in the vicinity of the Bermuda Triangle in 1974.

programme.title: Mountain Men (S13)
programme.desc: Lauro nears the end of the Iditarod, crossing 260 miles of ice along the Bering Sea coast to reach the finish line in Nome; Marty and his friend Dave haul supplies for a cabin into the backcountry.

programme.title: Forged in Fire (S10)
programme.desc: Two previous champions will face off in a gruelling five-hour challenge, making a blade inspired by Hollywood for the chance to duke it out against one of our titans of the forge.

programme.title: Swamp People (S15)
programme.desc: A drought and sweltering temperatures drop water levels to their lowest point in decades, and access to the best honey holes in the swamp are nearly impassable. Hunters take huge risks to fill tags.

programme.title: The Curse of Oak Island (S12)
programme.desc: As the Fellowship uncovers more of the mysterious structure in the swamp, artefacts within it suggest it could be a vault with a compelling history.

programme.title: The Death Coast
programme.desc: A powerful hurricane forces Jeff's team into a secluded cove, where they investigate The Lombrac, a legendary 18th-century ghost ship. The divers recover intriguing clues from the murky depths.

programme.title: Mountain Men (S13)
programme.desc: Lauro nears the end of the Iditarod, crossing 260 miles of ice along the Bering Sea coast to reach the finish line in Nome; Marty and his friend Dave haul supplies for a cabin into the backcountry.

programme.title: Life Gamble
programme.desc: Martial arts master Yu has retired for years but is invited to join force with another master Tao to fight against the four famous thieves and retrieve the stolen Dragon Jade. However, Tao’s real plan is to possess the treasure himself and kills Yu after he defeats the thieves...

programme.title: I Did It my Way
programme.desc: As the secretive, complex world of online drug trafficking increasingly targets Hong Kong, the police launches a risky and top-secret sting operation to bring down one of the most notorious drug lords in Asia.

programme.title: A Writer's Odyssey II
programme.desc: Struggling novelist Lu Kong Wen succumbs to a powerful temptation, plunging both himself and his fictional characters into an inescapable crisis. By rediscovering his purpose, he joins forces with his creations to heroically resolve a catastrophe that threatens both their worlds.

programme.title: Inexternal
programme.desc: Ming is brutally attacked at a veterinary clinic one day and falls into a coma. In coma, he is transported to a fantasy realm where an old Master Turtle teaches him ancient boxing skills to defeat an evil boss. Meanwhile, Ming’s mother finds a way to save her son…

programme.title: The 36th Chamber of Shaolin
programme.desc: Gordon Liu plays an anti-Manchu rebel who escapes to the Shaolin Temple and learns what it truly takes to become a martial arts master by challenging the 35 Shaolin Kung Fu chambers, eventually creating the 36th chamber himself.

programme.title: Wolf Pack
programme.desc: The Wolf Pack squad led by Lao Diao, is a foreign-based team that specializes in overseas security jobs. In one of the missions, the squad discovers that a terrorist force is planning to destroy the country’s energy source. Lao Diao is now entrusted with the task of leading his squad to fight back. Can the Wolf Pack save the day?

programme.title: Dragon Master: Dragon Spell
programme.desc: The Dragon King is locked in a seal by the Dragon Master for 500 years, and his daughter must travel back in time to 500 years ago to kill the Dragon Master, in order to reverse the act. Little did she know that the Dragon King and Dragon Master were close friends back then…

programme.title: My Indian Boyfriend
programme.desc: This is a love story between a Hong Kong girl and an Indian boy and is the first Bollywood movie to be made in Hong Kong. It encapsulates the conflicts caused by discrimination as well as differences in social-cultural background, lifestyle and family values between the races. The movie also combines tears, joy and laughter with song and dance.

programme.title: Angel with the Iron Fists
programme.desc: Lo Wei directs and stars as the chief detective in this gripping thriller; playing alongside Lily Ho, who excels in the role of an undercover avenger that can fight as well as she flirts! Caught between the crime bosses known as Baldhead and Black Widow, she only has four choices: punch, kick, shoot or bombard with explosives!

programme.title: The King Boxer
programme.desc: This tale of a honorable fighter's retraining in the "Iron Palm" style, that became the first international martial arts movie hit and made a continent-spanning star of Lo Lieh.

programme.title: Operation Bangkok
programme.desc: Military veteran Wu and undercover cop Ming rescue hostages on an island near Bangkok. Just as the mission is completed and they prepare to leave, Wu discovers his daughter has also been captured. Determined to save her, he stays with Ming to fight the thugs and rescue her.

programme.title: All U Need is Love
programme.desc: Ten major film companies join forces on a comedy-drama film to raise funds and create jobs for industry workers during the COVID-19 pandemic. This film features an all-star ensemble cast starring for free, with the story revolving around a group of hotel guests placed under quarantine in Hong Kong.

programme.title: Gang Master
programme.desc: This is a story about an army out to destroy the Hsien Lung gang of anti-Yuan revolutionaries. Their leader Ru Yi Tu is up against Fu Zhong Yuan, the identified successor of the Hsien Lung gang who must also prove his own legitimacy. The plot thickens with murder, sibling rivalry and shocking discoveries that could change the course of history.

programme.title: Whisper of Silent Body
programme.desc: Renowned as the "corpse whisperer," forensic pathologist Qin Ming uncovers vital clues from the corpses. During a homicide investigation, he unravels a murder case sixteen years ago in the snowy mountain with his assistant and a detective. Together, they unveil the secrets of the mysterious homicide.

programme.title: Hari ng Stunt
programme.desc: Hari Ng Stunt

programme.title: Una Kang naging Akin
programme.desc: Is there any way for Gabby to regain his other "memory" and remember the family he left behind?

programme.title: Init sa Magdamag (Digitally Enhanced)
programme.desc: This is a modern tale about woman. Her many moods. Her many faces. No matter who she was, happiness was not destined to be hers as all the events of her past eventually caught up with her.

programme.title: Ang Boyfriend kong Gamol (Digitally Enhanced)
programme.desc: Alice Dixson plays a rich woman who returns in the country with a plan to reach out to the poor and stop poverty. She decides to disguise herself so she can penetrate the poor community and in the process she meets Andrew E and falls in love with him despite their social differences.

programme.title: Pulis Probinsya (Pat. Omar Abdullah)
programme.desc: A cop from the province gets a new assignment in the big city. He was disappointed to find out that he would be living and working in a different turf where the games played are almost always deadly.

programme.title: TGIS, the Movie (Digitally Enhanced)
programme.desc: The top-rating TV show about teen-age life came to the screen in this adventure film where the TGIS kids learned the value of friendship.

programme.title: Batangueno Kabitenyo
programme.desc: This is a story of Magno,who is from Batangas and has the ability to attract women like flies.He goes to Manila hoping to change.

programme.title: Pikoy Goes To Malaysia
programme.desc: Tribal customs commands Pikoy to get married. But the union is against his will. He neglects his bride and humiliates his family. As punishment, he is banished from the tribe and forbidden to speak until he is ready to submit himself to the rules.

programme.title: Nananabik
programme.desc: Newlywed Dan (Ricky Belmonte) goes on an overseas trip where he becomes unwittingly involved with a crime syndicate. Meanwhile, with no word from him, his wife Nerissa (Didith Reyes) goes back to her old job and acquires herself a new boyfriend to fulfill her needs. What will happen when Dan finally comes back?

programme.title: Bakit Bughaw ang Langit?
programme.desc: Why is the sky blue? Why do we love the people we love? These are questions no one can answer. Because is just is.

programme.title: Jabidah Massacre
programme.desc: Based on the expose made by the late Senator Benigno "Ninoy" Aquino, Jabidah Massacre chronicles the story of how a group of recruits are turned into soldiers for a secret mission - the invasion of Sabah.

programme.title: Chick Boy
programme.desc: Stars in this comedy about university students living in the fast lane though they cannot afford to. They find work as helpers to a rich woman with three beautiful nieces. Of course they turn on the charm for the girls and their aunt.

programme.title: Mahal Kita, Alam mo Ba?
programme.desc: In his rush to escape from the policemen, Mario disguised himself as an Arab. At that same moment, Teresa was waiting for the Arab prince she was supposed to marry, whom she has never seen before. In the rush, she thought Mario was her prince and brought him home to meet her parents.

programme.desc: The Queen of Reptiles is visiting Isa, but the garden's a mess! Dora helps her get everything ready in time for La Reina's visit. / Dora meets Sammy the Sloth, who needs to get to Day Camp on time so he can show everyone a special surprise.

programme.title: Mr. Crocodile
programme.desc: Mr. Crocodile wants to be a good guest at Daisy's birthday party since he's never been to one before. // Rushing to get to a concert on time, Mr. Crocodile and Daisy misplace their tickets at Mom's Box and Ship Shop.

programme.title: Tim Rex in Space
programme.desc: Tim tries to be at two parties at once. // Tim tries to find a bogweed free snack for Kai. // After losing again and again, Tia tries to win every party game.

programme.title: Rubble & Crew
programme.desc: Mayor Greatway and Mr. Ducky-Doo want to show their skydiving skills. But when wind gets in the way, the pups help them sky dive on the ground! // When Wheeler and Truffles the pig can't ice skate, the crew finds a construction solution with wheels!

programme.title: Rubble & Crew
programme.desc: Rubble & the pups find Grandpa Gravel's lucky bowling ball. Too bad Builder Cove doesn't have a bowling alley... until now! // When a sudden superbloom traps Motor, Lily, and Park Ranger Rose, the pups need a flower-friendly construction solution.

programme.title: Paw Patrol
programme.desc: When a baby caribou winds up speeding down a mountainside. It's up to the PAW Patrol to save the calf and reunite him with his family. / When Luke Stars gets blown away in a giant tumbleweed, Digi and Tal make a duplicate which dances out of control.

programme.title: Paw Patrol
programme.desc: When Cap'n Turbot's ship disappears, the Paw Patrol must venture into the mysterious Adventure Bay Triangle to find the missing vessel. // When Alex and Mr. Porter swap roles, the pups must help track down the Mini-Patrol after they go missing.

programme.title: Dora
programme.desc: Dora and Boots race their boxcar against Croc Racers in the Rainforest Race. / Dora and Boots secretly hand out Big Red Chicken's birthday invites to all their friends in time for his birthday party.

programme.title: Dora
programme.desc: Dora rescues Boots and her friends from Benny's out-of-control balloon so they can all go to La Reina's castle party.

programme.title: Tim Rex in Space
programme.desc: Tim tries out some new rocket boots which soon fly out of control.

programme.title: Tim Rex in Space
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy and Tia bird-sit the Bronte's MoonParrot.

programme.title: Tim Rex in Space

programme.title: Mr. Crocodile

programme.title: Rubble & Crew
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew build the perfect place to show off River's ever-changing photography projects... Builder Cove's own art museum! // Farmer Zoe has a new goat on her farm! But when she can't find the singing goat, the pups team up with Park Ranger Rose.

programme.title: Rubble & Crew

programme.desc: Cali gets lost in the woods. // Daring Danny X's harness loosens while kite-surfing.

programme.desc: After a sudden snow storm, Everest cares for a wolf cub as they work together to help the PAW Patrol find them. // Famous wrong-way explorer, Travelling Travis accidentally takes Chickaletta to the North Pole where they run into some crocodiles?

programme.desc: Barbidur and Barbalala become little rebels. // But who are the Barbapapa?

programme.desc: Chickaletta is stuck on a runaway drone and mysterious butterflies are causing chaos all around Adventure Bay!

programme.desc: When Cafe Carl's pirate-themed restaurant gets caught in rough waters, the pups set sail with a new construction solution. // Sierra Sparkle calls in help from Rubble & Crew to build a special experience for all her fans in Builder Cove.

programme.title: Rubble & Crew
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew want to help open a new restaurant for everyone at the Buddy Walk Race... but they can't decide what kind of restaurant to build! // When Grandpa Gravel is feeling under the weather, Rubble & Crew step in to make his signature soup.

programme.title: Dora
programme.desc: Dora and Boots babysit some rowdy crocs. // Dora and Boots get the Troll to try an empanada at Benny's stand. // Boots tries new wacky new boots that Tico invented. // The twins have their first piñata party, but no one can figure out how to open it.

programme.title: Dora

programme.desc: A new farmer in town asks Rubble & Crew to build a barn for her pig! But will it be done in time for the big Pig Party? // Motor's super special birthday present gets delayed when the pups realize Builder Cove's airport needs a bigger runway.

programme.title: Paw Patrol
programme.desc: It’s monkey mayhem as pups play kickball against Raimondo’s team, until an eagle steals the ball. // The All Star Pups are ready to compete in the summer sports day when Daring Danny X turns the field into an ice rink!

programme.title: Paw Patrol
programme.desc: It’s the annual Jamboree Jamfest, but all of the fruit is carried off by ants! It's up to the pups to lure the ants to safety. // Zuma is on a wacky water rescue after Cornelius the pig goes for a ride on a windsurfing board.

programme.title: Barbapapa - One Big Happy Family!
programme.desc: The Barbababies want to invent like Leonardo da Vinci. // The Barbababies must choose between going to the pool or going for a bike ride.

programme.desc: Tim, Tommy and Tia bird-sit the Bronte's MoonParrot.

programme.title: Tim Rex in Space
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy and Tia take on their parents at Tailball.

programme.title: Tim Rex in Space
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy & Tia find a lost toy and vow to return it to its owner.

programme.title: Rubble & Crew
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew are ready to replace the broken telescope lens at the Observatory. Until it starts a fiery fiasco during delivery! / Café Carl's kittens cause construction chaos in the Bark Yard! Can the crew create a conclusion to the cat catastrophe?

programme.title: Rubble & Crew
programme.desc: Rubble and his construction pup family gear up to build a bridge, only to find the villainous Speed Meister has a different idea. It's up to Rubble & Crew to work together and save the day by building a new, safe bridge to Builder Cove.

programme.title: Dora
programme.desc: Boots wants to enjoy Banana Fest, but the Guava Geyser is erupting! Dora needs to stop the geyser and save the festival. / It's Picture Day, but the Grumpy Old Troll runs away! Dora follows him into Troll World to get him to come out for the picture.

programme.title: Full House S1 22
programme.desc: D.J. takes advantage of Joey's gullible nature by convincing him that she is sick so she can skip school and sneak down to the mall to get Stacey Q's autograph.

programme.title: Friends S7 10
programme.desc: Ross dresses up as the Holiday Armadillo and, with Monica, Chandler and Joey's help, teaches Ben about Chanukah. Phoebe worries that Rachel prefers living with Joey.

programme.title: Friends S7 11
programme.desc: Chandler and Rachel can't help eating the irresistible cheesecakes intended for a neighbor. Phoebe's former boyfriend returns for one night only, but Joey could ruin the romance. Monica plots revenge on her cousin's wedding day.

programme.title: Friends S7 12
programme.desc: Monica falls asleep during sex. Rachel argues with Tag. Ross and Joey get stranded on the roof.

programme.title: The Shining
programme.desc: Signing a contract, Jack Torrance, a normal writer and former teacher agrees to take care of a hotel which has a long, violent past that puts everyone in the hotel in a nervous situation. While Jack slowly gets more violent and angry of his life, his son, Danny, tries to use a special talent, the "Shining", to inform the people outside about whatever that is going on in the hotel.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory S8 7
programme.desc: The guys try to help Penny out of an awkward work dilemma, when a smitten doctor shows up at her door after her flirtatious sales techniques work a little too well.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory S8 8
programme.desc: When the gang recreates a high-school prom night on the roof of the guys' apartment building, Sheldon feels pressure to participate in all the typical romantic traditions.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory S8 9
programme.desc: When Leonard gets minor surgery on his nose, Sheldon has a major overreaction. Meanwhile Howard and Bernadette work on their marriage in light of Raj's parents' impending divorce.

programme.title: The Notebook
programme.desc:
Behind every great love is a great story.
In Seabrook, South Carolina in the 1940s, teenaged debutante Allie Hamilton and local boy Noah Calhoun spend one passionate, carefree summer together and deeply in love. But when the summer ends, war and duty separate the young couple.
Today, an elderly man visits a nursing home to read from his notebook to a woman whose memory is fading. As he spins a tale of two young lovers with their whole lives before them, his beloved Allie relives a long-ago passion that has never died, an unbreakable bond between two ordinary people rendered extraordinary by the strength, power and beauty of true love.
Based on the novel by Nicholas Sparks, author of A Walk to Remember and Message in a Bottle.

programme.title: Journey to the CentER of the Earth
programme.desc: During a scientific expedition to Iceland, scientist Trevor Anderson (Fraser-- Crash, The Mummy), his nephew Sean (Josh Hutcherson) and their local guide, Hannah (Anita Briem), are trapped in a cave -- from which their only escape is to go deeper, into unimagined worlds, where the trio comes face to face with never-before-seen creatures and harrowing dangers as they race an building volcanic eruption to reach the surface!

programme.title: Training Day
programme.desc: On his first day on the job as a narcotics officer, a rookie cop goes on a 24-hour training course with a rogue detective who isn't what he appears.

programme.title: The Town
programme.desc: Academy Award winner Ben Affleck writes, directs and stars in this crime drama/romance. Based on the novel The Prince of Thieves by Chuck Hogan, Affleck's film follows a career criminal (Affleck) who finds himself romantically involved with the manager of a bank (Rebecca Hall) he held up. A high-stakes love triangle develops when an equally infatuated FBI agent (Mad Men's Jon Hamm) arrives in the pursuit of justice. Stolen cash and a stolen heart lead to a relationship that could destroy this prince of thieves.

programme.title: Mad Max Beyond Thunderdome
programme.desc: Max tracks his stolen belongings to a strange city called Bartertown, ruled with an iron fist by Aunty Entity, who is locked in a power struggle with her rival Master Blaster.

programme.title: ER S2 7
programme.desc: After accepting a position in a private practice, Dr. Ross finds an injured boy trapped in a rural storm drain.

programme.title: ER S2 8
programme.desc: The hospital asks Dr. Ross to stay on staff; Lewis hires a patient with nanny experience; Jeanie Boulet is assigned to work with Benton.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory S8 10
programme.desc: While Sheldon says a tearful goodbye to the final installment of Fun with Flags, Leonard, Howard and Raj search for something significant in a dead professor's research.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory S8 11
programme.desc: Leonard and Howard turn to Raj for help in dealing with a work emergency when they nearly come to blows after blaming each other for a potential disaster at the university.

programme.title: Friends S7 13
programme.desc: Phoebe becomes involved with a suicidal office worker.Rachel breaks Joey's favorite chair.Monica's beloved childhood belongings are destroyed.

programme.title: Friends S7 14
programme.desc: Rachel's 30th birthday prompts the friends to reminisce about their own 30th birthdays.

programme.title: ContainER Wars S2 7
programme.desc: The Israelis form an unexpected alliance that threatens to bury their competition. And later, John digs up a container from beyond the grave but could it be cursed?

programme.title: ContainER Wars S2 8
programme.desc: When a container with a shady past lands on the auction block, Mo & Ty are ready to go all in. Will their big risk pay off? Or will their high hopes go up in smoke?

programme.title: ContainER Wars S2 9
programme.desc: The competition hits a fever pitch when a container from south of the border lands at the Port of Los Angeles. But when unexpected surprises are discovered inside, will the party be over?

programme.title: ContainER Wars S2 10
programme.desc: The biggest auction on the planet sails to the middle of the Pacific Ocean when a mysterious container is dredged up from the bottom of the sea. Royal rumors spark golden expectations, but how could have any of the waterlogged loot survived?

programme.title: Hack My Life S4 8
programme.desc: Brooke and Kevin go head-to-head testing out hacks to make your pool party the event of the year.

programme.title: Hack My Life S4 9
programme.desc: Go hack to the future to cope with some emotional hacks.

programme.title: Hack My Life S4 10
programme.desc: Kevin and Brooke learn at-home exercise hacks from Good Housekeeping. Plus, Kevin judges a granny vs. granny hack battle.

programme.title: The Fresh Prince of Bel-Air S1 1
programme.desc: Will Smith plays a young man transplanted from the tough streets of Philadelphia to live with his wealthy Bel-Air relatives, causing everyone to adjust how they live and think.

programme.title: The Fresh Prince of Bel-Air S1 2
programme.desc: Ashley's father wants her to continue with her violin lessons, but Will has other ideas.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers S4 8
programme.desc: The Jokers give each other humiliating tasks to complete on the mall escalator, ask absurd survey questions at the zoo and are forced to whisper sweet nothings to grocery store patrons. Plus, tonight's losers are the surprise opening act for ImagineDragons and must perform for 14,000 disappointed music fans.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers S4 9
programme.desc: Murr, Joe, Sal and Q get creative with their French fries at the mall food court, and compete to see whose ridiculous invention will win over a focus group. Then, the guys head to the Jersey Shore to serve up some embarrassment at a beachside burgerjoint.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers S4 10
programme.desc: The guys compete to stay undetected in a high flying challenge, force each other to do absurd tasks at a music store, and try to get a compliment on some not-so stylish outfits.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers S4 11
programme.desc: The guys blindly follow each other's humiliating directions at a water park, compete to sell their ridiculous book ideas, and try to convince unknowing strangers to save their seats in Time Square.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers S4 12
programme.desc: Things get explosive when the guys revive some classic jokes at their own expense. Then, they go head-to-head debating nonsense in a humiliating elimination challenge.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory S8 7
programme.desc: The guys try to help Penny out of an awkward work dilemma, when a smitten doctor shows up at her door after her flirtatious sales techniques work a little too well.

programme.title: Boston Blue (Season 1)
programme.desc: In BOSTON BLUE, a universe expansion of the long-running top drama BLUE BLOODS, Wahlberg will reprise his role as NYPD officer Danny Reagan as he takes a position with Boston PD. Once in Boston, he is paired with detective Lena Peters, the eldest daughter of a prominent law enforcement family.

programme.title: Sight Unseen (Season 2)
programme.desc: Amidst the effervescence of Lucas’s wedding day, Tess plays with fire as she uses Jake’s undercover investigation to get close to the man she holds responsible for her mother’s death. In this epic finale, Tess must challenge everything she thought she knew about her past to finally learn the truth about the fire that killed her mother and separated her from Lucas. Meanwhile, after spontaneously reaching out to her estranged mother in 209, Sunny continues to push boundaries in an attempt to convince herself she is cured, first sleeping with Kye, and then inviting the wolf to her door in the form of her mother – with unexpected consequences.

programme.title: Elsbeth (Season 3)
programme.desc: When a celebrity wigmaker is murdered, Elsbeth must comb through a tangled mess of suspects – and some drag brunch mayhem – to clip a killer.

programme.title: FBI (Season 8)
programme.desc: After a federal judge disappears, a routine investigation takes a dark turn as the team uncovers that the judge had been searching for his missing son on a secluded island on the city’s edge, where authority has crumbled.

programme.title: Doc (Season 2)
programme.desc: Inspired by a true story and based on the hit eponymous Italian drama series, Doc begins its second season of the life-affirming medical drama following the heartbreak and victories of hard-charging, brilliant physician Dr. Amy Larsen (Molly Parker) as she rebuilds her life after a car crash erased eight years of her memory. This season, Amy will continue to confront hard truths about her missing years, work to repair fractured relationships and seek to reconcile the person she used to be with the one everyone else has come to know.

programme.title: Push
programme.desc: Superhumans defy a government plot to harness and abuse their powers. Chris Evans and Dakota Fanning (the TWILIGHT films) team up in a pulse-pounding paranormal thriller.

programme.title: American Ninja Warrior (Season 15)
programme.desc: The National Finals conclude in Las Vegas as the remaining ninjas compete in Stage 3 and 4 and a $1 million winner is crowned as the next American Ninja Warrior.

programme.title: Elsbeth (Season 3)
programme.desc: When a celebrity wigmaker is murdered, Elsbeth must comb through a tangled mess of suspects – and some drag brunch mayhem – to clip a killer.

programme.title: NCIS: Sydney (Season 3)
programme.desc: When a U.S. Navy pilot goes missing at a UFO hotspot in the Outback after being chased by blinding lights, the team must discover if the truth is really “out there."

programme.title: FBI (Season 8)
programme.desc: After a federal judge disappears, a routine investigation takes a dark turn as the team uncovers that the judge had been searching for his missing son on a secluded island on the city’s edge, where authority has crumbled.

programme.title: Boston Blue (Season 1)
programme.desc: In BOSTON BLUE, a universe expansion of the long-running top drama BLUE BLOODS, Wahlberg will reprise his role as NYPD officer Danny Reagan as he takes a position with Boston PD. Once in Boston, he is paired with detective Lena Peters, the eldest daughter of a prominent law enforcement family.

programme.title: CIA (Season 1)
programme.desc: When a top-secret weapon is stolen in broad daylight from a U.S. defense contractor, CIA agent Colin Glass is paired with FBI agent Bill Goodman to investigate. Their new partnership gets off to a rocky start.

programme.title: F9 The Fast Saga
programme.desc: The true meaning of family gets tested like never before as Dom Toretto takes the team on a worldwide ride with high-stakes action, old friends and a surprising new foe.

programme.title: White House Down
programme.desc: While on a tour of the White House with his young daughter, a police officer (Channing Tatum) springs into action to protect his child and the president (Jamie Foxx) from a heavily armed group of paramilitary invaders.

programme.title: Cyril: Simply Magic
programme.desc: Join Cyril on a journey of self-discovery in various locations across Asia as he shares the marvels of his magic.

programme.title: S.W.A.T. (Season 7)
programme.desc: SWAT faces their deadliest adversary yet when a violent cell of extremists looks to extract vengeance by blowing up half of Los Angeles, potentially killing thousands.

programme.title: NCIS: Origins (Season 1)
programme.desc: In the series, Gibbs starts his career as a newly minted special agent at the fledgling NCIS Camp Pendleton office where he forges his place on a gritty, ragtag team led by NCIS legend Mike Franks.

programme.title: Night at the Eagle Inn
programme.desc: A pair of fraternal twins spend a terrifying night in a remote inn to investigate the last known whereabouts of their father who mysteriously disappeared the night they were born. As they dive deeper, the property's dark secrets ensnare them in a hellish labyrinth which they must escape before dawn.

programme.title: The Case of Disappearances
programme.desc: In Misty Village, the adopted son Wen Jie is haunted by a recurring nightmare. He delves into a series of disappearance cases in the village to seek his true identity. As more villagers die mysteriously, belief in the curse of Emperor Jing Lung intensifies. Wen Jie teams up with the security chief to unveil the conspiracy and protect the villagers.

programme.title: The Ice Cream Truck
programme.desc: Mary moves back to her suburban hometown as her husband is relocated there for work. While waiting for her husband in their new house, Mary becomes the target of an evil slasher that stalks the suburbs in an ice-cream truck. She soon learns that the suburbs are not what they seem...

programme.title: 3AM
programme.desc: A school girl joins two internet content creators in a horror video project filmed in an old building behind their school. The trio encounters a bullying gang and as events unfold, it becomes clear that the girl holds a personal grudge against the gang and is blinded by hatred to exercise justice, even if it means sacrificing the innocents…

programme.title: She is in Danger
programme.desc: After a fight with her boyfriend, Xue leaves home to stay in a remote B&B accommodation, together with a roommate Yi. One night, Xue accidentally discovers that Yi and another friend have killed Yi's ex-boyfriend, and is locked up by the duo so as to cover up the murder. Xue's buddy, Wen, comes seeking for her - can Xue and Wen escape from danger?

programme.title: An Unquiet Grave
programme.desc: A year after Jamie's wife tragically died in a car accident, he persuades her sister, Ava, to accompany him to the accident site to perform a peculiar ritual. As the night progresses, it becomes evident that Jamie harbours sinister motives.

programme.title: Night at the Eagle Inn
programme.desc: A pair of fraternal twins spend a terrifying night in a remote inn to investigate the last known whereabouts of their father who mysteriously disappeared the night they were born. As they dive deeper, the property's dark secrets ensnare them in a hellish labyrinth which they must escape before dawn.

programme.title: The Case of Disappearances
programme.desc: In Misty Village, the adopted son Wen Jie is haunted by a recurring nightmare. He delves into a series of disappearance cases in the village to seek his true identity. programme.title: The Ice Cream Truck
programme.desc: Mary moves back to her suburban hometown as her husband is relocated there for work. While waiting for her husband in their new house, Mary becomes the target of an evil slasher that stalks the suburbs in an ice-cream truck. She soon learns that the suburbs are not what they seem...

programme.title: Zombie Island
programme.desc: Jeff, a big fan of zombies, goes to a deserted and mysterious island with his friends hoping to seek out exciting adventures. What started as an adventure turns out to be a horrifying journey as they get trapped on the island and are attacked by the zombies! Their lives are in danger when they fail to fight back, and the game has only just begun!

programme.title: The Possession of Leah Dela Cruz
programme.desc: A female cop moves into a small town, and gets drawn to a case that involves a girl who is possessed by an evil spirit.

programme.title: A Sealed Book
programme.desc: The world descends into darkness when a sealed book, said to command the forces of the universe, is unearthed in an underground palace in the desert. As adventurers race to claim its power, the palace gates open, unleashing an unseen terror and heralding a catastrophe beyond imagination.

programme.title: Mid-night Two
programme.desc: Yi Cheng and his friends venture into a haunted mountain that hides an ancient corpse and an eternal ghostly flame. No one who enters the mountain ever returns and at 2:30 AM, Yi Cheng’s friends vanish one by one. While searching for them in the eerie forest, Yi Cheng enters a realm of infinite reincarnation, facing a series of terrifying events…

programme.title: Mama Ghost
programme.desc: In a coastal town, a forbidden romance sparks between Rico and Sisca, and their love unleashes a malevolent spirit. As chilling deaths plague the town, past secrets are being unraveled and the town is possessed by evil and fear. Rico must defy destiny and fight against the evil spirit to save his loved one.

programme.title: Interrogation Raw (S2)
programme.desc: After a man and a woman are found shot, investigators struggle to find clues to catch the killer until a deputy locates the victim's car filled with guns, silencers, and a mysterious man behind the wheel.

programme.title: Interrogation Raw (S2)
programme.desc: When an otherwise healthy woman is admitted to the hospital with sudden organ failure, an anonymous tip leads authorities to investigate a pattern of deaths in her family and a shocking prime suspect.

programme.title: Sleeping with a Killer (S2)
programme.desc: When a woman reports a brutal assault, investigators discover shifting stories, divided loyalties, and a jealous love triangle with deadly consequences.

programme.title: Lie Detector: Truth or Deception
programme.desc: Eva Hamby sits down for a polygraph test with a former FBI agent in an effort to clear her name. Hamby was convicted of second-degree murder for the stabbing death of her boyfriend.

programme.title: Tell Me How I Died
programme.desc: After a storm hits Warwick Cove, RI, a boat dragging its anchor appears in the harbour with a decomposed corpse onboard. Pathologist Dr. Priya Banerjee must identify the John Doe and determine how he died.

programme.title: My Ghost Story Asia (S1)
programme.desc: A man sees strange things on the deadly Karak Highway. Next, souls of dead children are kept in an amulet. Later, two men are spooked at a suicide spot.

programme.title: My Ghost Story Asia (S1)
programme.desc: Actress Mandy Chen feels a spirit following her after acting as a murdered victim. Next, six flatmates are spooked. Later, a photographer captures a haunting image.

programme.title: My Strange Arrest (S2)
programme.desc: A look at some of the strangest arrests from across the country: a gas station robbery has a strange culprit; a driver arrested for DUI finds new ways to add to his rap sheet. And more!

programme.title: My Strange Arrest (S2)
programme.desc: A woman alerts police to a crime she's committing; a golf game leads one player to see red on the green; a man wants to get paid by police during a traffic stop; and more!

programme.title: Hoarders (S14)
programme.desc: Jim has been a collector from a very young age but some of the tragedies in his life have compounded Jim's hoarding behavior.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: Murder in the Bayou
programme.desc: In 1991 Curtis "Cochise" Smith, 29, heads out for diapers in Plaquemine, Louisiana, and vanishes. Twenty-five years later, a body surfaces in the bayou, and Cochise's murder case reignites.

programme.title: #TextMeWhenYouGetHome (S2)
programme.desc: Kelsey's family knew something was amiss when their usually responsible and responsive daughter didn't respond to their texts while out running an errand.

programme.title: #TextMeWhenYouGetHome (S2)
programme.desc: 9-year-old Kamryn Johnson is supposed to be at gymnastics class when her mother, Sheraton, receives a frantic phone call saying Kamryn is being held captive for ransom.

programme.title: Court Cam (S6)
programme.desc: A look at some of the wildest courtroom moments. A defendant claims she's the wife of a prince; a church pastor gets sentenced for running an unlicensed funeral business; and more.

programme.title: Court Cam (S6)
programme.desc: A look at some of the wildest courtroom moments. A defendant flips off a judge; a baby interrupts a hearing; a mom sounds off on one of the men responsible for her daughter's death; and more.

programme.desc: It's the biggest manhunt in Taiwan's history when three criminals rapes and murders a famous pop star's daughter, Pai Hsiao Yen, and go on to commit other crimes.

programme.desc: After New Orleans detectives find a woman's burnt body in her car's trunk, they discover that her desperate 911 call went unheeded.

programme.desc: A look at some of the wildest courtroom moments. A defendant flips off a judge; a baby interrupts a hearing; a mom sounds off on one of the men responsible for her daughter's death; and more.

programme.title: L'Aventure Du Monde Des Mondes
programme.desc: Dimitri, Raph's and Anais's uncle, is a French globetrotter who is fascinated by nature. He gives them tasks to stimulate their creativity. Thanks to Blox, a small robot, they access the ''world of the worlds'', a secret fantasy place where they can play and learn.

programme.title: Roi Keita
programme.desc: The entire empire is on alert: Soundiata Keita's mother has been kidnapped. Abdul, as thirsty for power as ever, heads to the city of the sacred baobab trees.

programme.title: Mission Info
programme.desc: News programme aimed at 7 to 11-year-olds! Each episode, devised for children and their parents, provides insight accessible to younger ones, combined with explanations, immersive reports and expert interviews. An educational quiz also gives children the chance to test their knowledge in a fun way.

programme.title: Terra Artistika
programme.desc: etienne Moyat's creations reflect his deep respect and love for nature. A trained cabinetmaker, he produces unique, monumental pieces for high-end projects. Alongside this, he pursues an intense and instinctive painting practice.

programme.title: Falo
programme.desc: A news magazine show, ''Falo'' discusses and analyses current affairs in depth.

programme.title: Objectif Monde L'Hebdo
programme.desc: Report, inquiry, investigation ... ''Objectif Monde L'Hebdo'', a television magazine by French-speaking editorialists, takes time to reflect and analyse through the expert insights and opinions provided by specialists. A TV5MONDE programme, jointly produced with RTS, in collaboration with its francophone partners (RTBF, Radio-Canada, France Televisions).

programme.title: Magazine
programme.desc: Magazine

programme.title: Le Magazine De La Riviera
programme.desc: The magazine programme all about the art of living in Monaco, Provence and on the Cote d'Azur.

programme.title: Suisse En Scene
programme.desc: Interview with a key figure from the Swiss cultural scene. An opportunity to look back at their life and career, and the foundations that underpin their work.

programme.title: Rassemblance
programme.desc: After growing up in a squat near Paris and then in a working-class neighborhood in the 19th arrondissement, Sikou became an author and director. His work explores the fractures of identity, social class, gender and racism. Through cinema and writing, he gives a voice to those condemned to silence.

programme.title: Le Match Dans Le Match
programme.desc: She's a big name in French swimming! Olympic silver medalist in Athens in 2004, multiple European and World medalist, she was for years the face of French sprinting in the pool: Malia Metella is Pierre Classen's guest.

programme.title: Le Telejournal De Radio-Canada
programme.desc: The televised news programme from the Radio-Canada team.

programme.title: Generation F
programme.desc: In the Chateau-Rouge district of Paris, Richard Orlinski meets Diadie Diombana, a self-taught chef of Malian origin, who embodies a mixed cuisine blending West African, Japanese and Latin American influences. With him, the market becomes a true laboratory of inspiration, where each ingredient is a bridge between cultures. In Marseille, Hugues Mbanda, a chef originally from Kinshasa, has a journey marked by exile and a passion for French gastronomy. In his two restaurants, Kin and Libala, he offers dishes that combine African traditions and French know-how. Hugues also takes part in the Climat Libe Tour, an event raising awareness of sustainable and responsible food.

programme.title: Hep Taxi !
programme.desc: In town or in the countryside, day or night, Jerome Colin, the presenter-taxi driver leads his prestigious customer on a four-wheel journey conducive to secrets.

programme.title: Guides D'Aventures
programme.desc: He figures amongst the thirty Canadians aged under 30 considered the most influential in terms of sustainable development. Justin Fisch welcomes a group for a trip by canoe-kayak through the Everglades: a forty-kilometre journey to explore the famous wetlands.

programme.title: Tendance XXI
programme.desc: French creativity is booming in the fields of fashion, crafts, design, beauty and gastronomy. 'Tendance XXI' showcases a know-how that evolves in tune with the times, sometimes even anticipating them.

programme.title: Version Francaise
programme.desc: Clemence d'Ennery unveils her collection of Asian works in a Paris hotel. Using porcelain petals, Juliette Clovis opens up a luminous, dreamlike world. At Rabanne, we push the boundaries of women's dressing with bold materials. Immerse yourself in the studio of artist Marion Mezenge.

programme.title: Questions Pour Un Champion
programme.desc: A general knowledge quiz.

programme.title: Savourer
programme.desc: On the menu: maple-glazed spicy pork, maple and apple lentil salad, maple caramelised tofu, homemade maple leaf biscuit.

programme.desc: TV5MONDE's new economic news bulletin, presented by Vicky Bogaert. ''Parlons eco'' analyses today's major trends and interviews the men and women who are starting businesses, innovating and imagining the economy of tomorrow.

programme.title: Meurtres En Perigord Vert
programme.desc: In Perigord, Isabelle Maurin, recently crowned Queen of Araucania, is found decapitated in the garden of the chateau she has just inherited. This is not the first murder linked to this family. Emma Lambert, a young police lieutenant from Bordeaux, conducts the investigation with Sacha Besson, a lieutenant of the local gendarmerie.

programme.desc: Over a phone message, a man explains how to use his tractor so that the person on the other end can mow the lawn in his garden in his absence.

programme.title: Yetili
programme.desc: Nina and Leon, two little mice, live in a bookshop whose mascot is a large yeti cuddly toy called Yetili. Each evening, once the bookshop has closed, Yetili comes to life and settles his two friends on his knees to read them a story.

programme.title: Fara
programme.desc: Fara and Koto are two children born with disabilities. Seeing this as a curse, their parents plan to bury them alive to ward it off. Thanks to the kindness of their brothers and sisters, they narrowly escape and embark on a fantastic adventure.

programme.title: Les Metiers
programme.desc: To gain a better understanding of some professions, school children explain jobs to their parents in their own words.

programme.title: Les Jeux De La Fontaine
programme.desc: Rabbit and Tortoise take part in the 400 metres hurdles. When Tortoise takes a fall during the race, Rabbit decides to be supportive and help her opponent across the finishing line.

programme.title: Les Danger
programme.desc: The world is undergoing a brutal change: technology is breaking down and all sources of energy are disappearing. All except Tes and Oskar's heads, whose hair starts to generate electricity! Using this power, they set out to find their missing mother.

programme.desc: The world is undergoing a brutal change: technology is breaking down and all sources of energy are disappearing. All except Tes and Oskar's heads, whose hair starts to generate electricity! Using this power, they set out to find their missing mother.

programme.title: Les Triples

programme.title: Potobot
